description: A former customer is being charged for unreturned equipment they claim to have sent back.

nodes.task_description: Identify the former customer's account and the specific equipment charge.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the closed account and the charge for a modem.

nodes.task_description: Ask the customer for the return tracking number and check it in the logistics system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent takes the tracking number and uses a tool to verify it.

nodes.task_description: The tracking number confirms the item was received. Remove the equipment charge from the final bill.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the return was successful and credits the customer's account for the charge.
